Bash(python -c "
import sys
sys.path.insert\(0, '.claude/skills/jtool/scripts/src'\)
from jtool import DevType, devices_scan

print\('测试 devices_scan 返回值:'\)
for dev_type in [DevType.I2C, DevType.SPI, DevType.IO]:
    devices = devices_scan\(dev_type\)
    print\(f'{dev_type.name}: {devices}'\)
    print\(f'  数量: {len\(devices\)}, 唯一值: {len\(set\(devices\)\)}'\)
")

Bash(python -c "
import fitz
doc = fitz.open\('datasheet/TDC_GP22.pdf'\)
with open\('tdc_gp22_content.txt', 'w', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    for i, page in enumerate\(doc[:20]\):
        f.write\(f'\\n=== PAGE {i+1} ===\\n'\)
        f.write\(page.get_text\(\)\)
print\('PDF content extracted to tdc_gp22_content.txt'\)
")

Bash(python -c "
import fitz
doc = fitz.open\('datasheet/TDC_GP22.pdf'\)
with open\('tdc_gp22_content_full.txt', 'w', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    for i, page in enumerate\(doc\):
        f.write\(f'\\n=== PAGE {i+1} ===\\n'\)
        f.write\(page.get_text\(\)\)
print\(f'Extracted {len\(doc\)} pages to tdc_gp22_content_full.txt'\)
")
